nasb.text: from the firstborn of the sons of Israel he took the money in terms of the shekel of the sanctuary, 1,365.

esv.text: From the firstborn of the people of Israel he took the money, 1,365 shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary.

cnv.text: 從頭生的以色列人收取的銀子，根據聖所的秤，共有約十五公斤。

ccb.text: 以圣所的秤计算，共十五公斤银子，
